items.title: Trump tells Netanyahu Iran nuclear talks must continue
items.description: The US President said "nothing definitive" was agreed during the meeting between the two leaders at the White House on Wednesday as nuclear talks inte...

items.title: US reopens airspace over Texas border town after 'cartel drone incursion'
items.description: The FAA had closed the airspace around El Paso for more than a week citing security measures, but then quickly said flights could resume.

items.title: Powerful cyclone kills at least 31 as it tears through Madagascar port
items.description: Madagascar's disaster management says roads are inaccessible with trees uprooted, power poles down and ninety percent of roofs ripped off.

items.title: 'It was terrifying': Tumbler Ridge's tight-knit community in shock after shooting
items.description: Members of the remote community have spoken of their fear and uncertainty after nine people were killed.

items.title: Police release man detained in connection to Nancy Guthrie disappearance
items.description: Police had searched the home of the person, who was taken into custody at a traffic stop.
